commands.review_summary:
The branch adds Discord preflight media fields, resolves direct and forwarded media before queueing, reuses those resolved media lists during processing, and adds focused regression tests.

PR surface: Source +55, Tests +87. Total +142 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main preflights the message before queue insertion, then downloads direct and forwarded media later inside processDiscordMessageInner. I did not establish a live Discord CDN-expiry reproduction in this read-only pass.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining blocker is contributor or maintainer real Discord proof and normal PR review, not a narrow code repair for automation.

target.title: fix(discord): download attachments at receipt time, not after the run queue
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

Discord messages with attachments lose their media when they sit in the inbound run queue while OpenClaw is busy processing another request. By the time the queued message is dequeued and processed, Discord's CDN attachment URL (which carries an expiring `ex` TTL) has expired, the download silently fails, and the agent receives a path to a file that was never saved to disk.

## Why This Change Was Made

`appendResolvedMediaFromAttachments` (via `resolveMediaList`/`resolveForwardedMediaList`) was being called from `processDiscordMessageInner`, which only runs once the inbound run queue dispatches the job — after any queue wait. This change moves that resolution into `preflightDiscordMessage`, which runs once at message-receipt time, before the message is handed to the run queue. The resolved media list is carried forward on the preflight context (`preflightMediaList` / `preflightForwardedMediaList`, following the same pattern already used for `preflightAudioTranscript`) so `processDiscordMessageInner` reuses it instead of re-fetching. Contexts built outside real preflight (existing test harnesses) fall back to the previous fetch-at-process-time behavior, so no other test changes were needed.

## User Impact

Discord image/file/video attachments sent while OpenClaw is busy will now be downloaded immediately on receipt and survive run-queue delays, instead of silently disappearing from the agent's context.

## Evidence

- Root cause and repro confirmed against `extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-media.ts` (`appendResolvedMediaFromAttachments`) and `extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.process.ts` (previous fetch site).
- Added regression test in `message-handler.preflight.test.ts` proving attachments are downloaded during preflight (`preflightMediaList` populated) before the message reaches the run queue.
- Added regression test in `message-handler.process.test.ts` proving `processDiscordMessageInner` reuses preflight-resolved media and never re-fetches (a throwing `fetchImpl` proves no re-fetch).
- `pnpm tsgo:extensions` and `pnpm tsgo:extensions:test`: clean.
- `pnpm test extensions/discord`: 1796/1796 pass (was 1794; 2 new regression tests added, no regressions).
- `oxfmt`/`oxlint` on changed files: clean.

Fixes #96165
target.author: zacharyyw
